notes_for_human_reviewer: Solid intermediate, right at the hire-ready boundary. three_tests: applies all three to the facts and flags the over-escalation temptation, but names only one failure mode (over-escalating) — does not explicitly name the under-escalation/passivity failure — so short of the 5-anchor. ladder: selects sponsor-through-R and justifies routing, but the lowest-rung-that-works reasoning is lighter than ceiling. packet: situation/impact/tried/ask all present and specific, but the options-with-trade-offs element is absent (gives the ask but no menu of paths forward) — keeps it at 4. tone: measured and addresses blame-avoidance, but does not explicitly invoke the forward test. channel_and_followthrough: declines the direct path, routes T. Adeyemi through R., commits to chasing the outcome — but does not name the don't-re-escalate-the-same-thing discipline or the record close-out (RAID + status update). Not yet hire-ready because each dimension lands one specific 5-anchor indicator short.
